faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.desc: Everything you need to know about our Video Compressor
faq.q1: Does it cost money to use this video compressor?
faq.a1: Yes, VideoCompressorPro is a free video compressor online tool, which allows you to compress video without any complicated software or hidden cost and also to reduce the video file size quickly.
faq.q2: Will I be able to use this video compressor tool on my mobile phone?
faq.a2: Yes, our video compressor online will run smoothly on Android, iPhone, tablet, laptop and desktop on any modern browser.
faq.a3: Just upload your video, select compression parameters and our intelligent video compression technology will optimize the file size while preserving high-quality video.
faq.q4: How to shrink Video without Quality Loss?
faq.a4: Adjust your compression settings so they're balanced; reduce file size but maintain resolution and bit rate. VideoCompressorPro is designed to compress video without any loss of quality.
faq.q5: How can I play a compressed video?
faq.a5: Compressed videos function in the same way as regular video files, and can be played on devices such as phones, laptops, browsers, media players, and social media sites.
faq.q6: What's the best video encoder to compress?
faq.a6: One of the most widely-used video encoders is H.264 which offers high compression, smooth playback, and good compatibility between devices.
faq.q7: Does VideoCompressorPro have a video upload limit?
faq.a7: The upload performance will vary according to the browser you are using and the resources on your device but our online video compressor is optimized for easy small and large video files to upload.
faq.a8: VideoCompressorPro is employed by businesses, creators, marketers, educators, editors and social media teams for professional video compression workflows.
faq.q9: Is there any software to download or install?
faq.a9: There is no installation needed. This online video compressor is used straight from the browser to compress video easily and quickly.
faq.q10: Is VideoCompressorPro actually a Free software?
faq.a10: Yes, there's a way to compress videos online for free, with no subscription, downloads or complicated setups.
faq.q11: Which video file formats do I have to compress?
faq.a11: Commonly used video file formats include MP4, MOV, AVI, MKV, WebM, MPEG and more that can be compressed.
faq.q12: How to reduce the size of a video?
faq.a12: Upload your video, select the compression level you want and download a compressed version of your video that is smaller and smoother.
faq.q13: What are the ways to minimize the size of MP4 files?
faq.a13: Reduce the video compression level, bitrate, or resolution without compromising quality and visual fidelity with our MP4 video compressor.
faq.q14: How to compress a video without losing quality?
faq.a14: Select optimum compression parameters to take into account how much video quality you need and how much disc space you want to save. VideoCompressorPro is developed to accomplish good quality compression.
faq.q15: Why is it important to change the quality of a video?
faq.a15: Adjusting video quality optimises file size for website, social media, email attachments, cloud storage and upload speed.
faq.q16: Is it possible to change the bitrate, frames per second (FPS), resolution and CRF?
faq.a16: Yes, you can adjust bitrate, FPS, resolution, and CRF to get the output that you want and the file size that you need.
faq.q17: How many frames per second are there in a 1-minute, 4K video?
faq.a17: A 4K video, before compression, can be as large as several hundred megabytes to multiple gigabytes depending on the Bit-rate and codec used.
faq.q18: Is it possible to upload 4k videos to Instagram?
faq.a18: Yes, you can upload high resolution videos to Instagram, but you can also make the uploads faster by compressing the 4K videos first, then upload them to Instagram.
faq.q19: Is it possible to compress videos for Discord?
faq.a19: Yes, our Discord video compressor can help you to identify the file size for uploads without compromising video quality.
faq.q20: Is there any mobile video compression support in this tool?
faq.a20: Yes, you can compress videos straight from the cell phone browser without installation of any application, for Android and iPhone.
faq.q21: Will my video be safe while being compressed?
faq.a21: Yes, VideoCompressorPro is developed with privacy and protection in mind, and you can be sure that your video files will be protected during processing.
faq.q22: Can I shrink big 4K videos or HD videos?
faq.a22: Yes, our video compressor can compress video at HD and 4K resolution for easier video sharing, storage and faster video uploading.
faq.q23: Is compression going to impact video quality?
faq.a23: Quality may be slightly diminished in compression, depending on setting, but our smart video compression system is designed to maintain maximum clarity.
faq.q24: May I compress videos to send by email?
faq.a24: Yes, you can certainly resize video files so that they are smaller and easier to share via email, and upload faster, without any fancy editing software.
faq.q25: Which is the optimum format for compression?
faq.a25: MP4 is one of the best options since it is smaller in file size, highly compatible and doesn't compromise on video quality.

cropper_page.r8_text: This video cropper was very useful for me when I needed to reframe my horizontal videos for TikTok, and no edges were blurred or zoomed out.
cropper_page.r9_text: One of my favorite aspects of the 1:1 Instagram crop preset is that I can have my product videos look balanced and professional on all social media campaigns.
cropper_page.r10_text: Thank you for the quick and in-browser editing, privacy is a big concern with un-released client work.
cropper_page.r11_text: The portrait video layouts are exactly what is needed for Instagram Stories and mobile ads; my videos now look so much better for vertical viewing.
cropper_page.r12_text: Simple interface, smooth resize controls, no watermark exports, very easy to use, one of the best video cropping sites I've used lately.
cropper_page.q1: How can I resize a video to a custom width and height?
cropper_page.a1: Yes, the online video cropper enables you to modify custom dimensions and move frames around for the preferred layout, aspect proportion, or platform requirements.
cropper_page.q2: Which formats can I use with this video cropper?
cropper_page.a2: We support the following common video files: MP4, MOV, AVI, MKV, WebM, MPEG and many others.
cropper_page.q3: How can I crop video for YouTube?
cropper_page.a3: Upload your video, select a layout (widescreen or Shorts-ready), make the framing adjustments and export your YouTube-ready content directly from the browser.
cropper_page.q4: Will video cropping impact video quality or size?
cropper_page.a4: The file size of the video may vary slightly, depending on the export settings, but our video cropper is designed to ensure that the video quality is excellent.
cropper_page.q5: Is it possible to resize videos without changing the aspect ratio?
cropper_page.a5: Yes you can lock aspect ratios when adjusting layouts to ensure well-balanced aspect ratios and avoid stretching or distorting the visuals.
cropper_page.q6: When exporting, can I change the video format?
cropper_page.a6: Yes, we support exporting videos of various formats as per the devices you are compatible with and your workflow requirements.
cropper_page.q7: What do I have to download to use this video cropper?
cropper_page.a7: There's no installation needed. Video cropper for browsers is an online video editing tool that works from desktop and mobile devices.
cropper_page.q8: Is it possible to use this video cropper on my mobile?
cropper_page.a8: Yes, our free online video cropper is smooth and operational on Android, iPhone, tablets, laptop and desktop browsers.
cropper_page.q9: Is there any limit on the size of the file?
cropper_page.a9: The largest file size supported is dependent upon the speed of your browser and device and is not a limitation of our tool, which is designed to process small and large video files with ease.
cropper_page.q10: Which is the top video editor that has a video cropper function?
cropper_page.a10: The ideal online video cropper should be speedy, secure, user-friendly, and enable you to export a quality video without watermark. Smart presets, browser-based editing, and clean exports: these are the things employed by VideoCompressorPro as a way to enable creators to resize their videos rapidly for YouTube, TikTok, Instagram, and more.

about_page.hero_subtitle: We believe that you shouldn't have to sacrifice your personal data just to shrink a video file. That's why we built a tool that works entirely on your device.
about_page.story_p1: In 2024, our founders noticed a disturbing trend: most "free" online video tools were actually data harvesting machines. To compress a simple video, you had to upload it to a server you didn't control, wait in a queue, and hope your private content was safe.
about_page.story_p2: We decided to change that. By leveraging modern browser technology like WebAssembly, we created a platform that delivers professional-grade video processing without ever asking for your data.
about_page.v1_desc: Zero uploads. Your files stay on your device, exactly where they belong.
about_page.v2_desc: Local processing means no upload or download queues. Instant results.
about_page.v3_desc: Professional video tools should be accessible to everyone, without hidden costs.
